name: Asparagus Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Break off the woody ends from asparagus and cut spears into 1/2-inch diagonal slices.
2. Heat half of the oil in a wok or skillet and cook asparagus until bright green. Push asparagus to one side.
3. Add remaining oil and sauté shrimp and mushrooms for 2 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, broth, soy sauce, mirin (or sherry), and sugar.
5. Stir the mixture into the asparagus mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes longer.
